title: The Hunt Begins

narrative.intro: Your old companion has been taken by those who want to silence the truth. Nexus Industries has activated their black ops division, and your friend was captured in a midnight raid. But they made one mistake - they left a witness who saw where they took them.
narrative.briefing: Intel indicates your friend is being held at a secure black site in the industrial district. This is a fortified position with heavy security. You'll need to hit fast and hard before they can move the prisoner or worse.
narrative.completion_success: You've extracted your friend from the black site, but they've been through interrogation. They're injured but alive, and more determined than ever to bring Nexus down. They reveal the location of the final target - the head of Project Silence.
narrative.completion_failure: The black site was a trap. Your friend was moved hours ago. But in the chaos, you intercepted communications revealing the location of Nexus's final stronghold.

execution_protocol.description: If alarm triggered and not disabled by round 5, prisoner is executed

primary.description: Free the prisoner from the holding facility and extract

secondary.description: Disable the alarm control to prevent lockdown
secondary.completion_requirement: One activation at alarm control before round 4

special_item.name: Black Site Access Card
special_item.description: High-level security credentials for Nexus facilities

bonus_item.name: Commander's Datapad
bonus_item.description: Contains encrypted orders revealing the location of the Project Silence mastermind

tutorial_context: This is the penultimate mission. Multiple objectives must be managed simultaneously. Use the Objective Display to track your priorities.
